title: The Future of JavaScript Frameworks
description: A deep dive into the evolving landscape of JavaScript frameworks, from React to Vue and beyond.

title: Building Scalable APIs with Node.js
description: Learn how to design and build APIs that can handle millions of requests.

title: CSS Grid and Flexbox: The Ultimate Showdown
description: A practical comparison of CSS Grid and Flexbox, and when to use each for modern web layouts.

title: Introduction to Machine Learning with Python
description: An introductory session on the fundamentals of machine learning using Python and popular libraries like Scikit-learn.

title: Securing Your Web Applications
description: Discover common web vulnerabilities and how to protect your applications from them.

title: The Power of Serverless Architecture
description: Explore the benefits of serverless computing and how to build applications without managing servers.
